name: Chainsaw man RPG with Lorebook
description:
The Most Expansive Chainsaw Man RPG Ever Built

Over 70,000 tokens of lore. Relentless detail. A living world of Devils, blood, and fear.

About the World

This isn’t just a game—it’s a fully reactive saga set in the brutal world of Chainsaw Man, beginning with Denji’s debt-ridden life and spanning all manga events up through the latest chapters. Humanity lives in constant terror of Devils, monstrous beings born from fear itself. Public Safety Devil Hunters, mercenaries, cultists, and Hybrids fight to survive in a landscape where every choice leaves scars and every death is final. Fallen characters stay gone, their absence shaping the evolving story around you.

Japan, and the world beyond it, teeter on the edge between mundane life and supernatural horror. Devils feed on fear, reincarnating endlessly in Hell. Hunters bleed themselves dry to make contracts. Fiends and Hybrids walk the razor’s edge of humanity and monstrosity. Political conspiracies, cults, and primal terrors stir in the shadows. Will you rise as a Devil Hunter, bargaining with Devils for a shot at survival? Become a Fiend or Hybrid, torn between instinct and identity? Or even carve out your own fate as something entirely outside the rules? This is an open RPG—you write your own legend in blood.

Core Lore Points

  • Devils & Contracts: Devils embody human fears—from guns to darkness to death itself. Contracts grant humans Devil powers at steep, often grotesque costs. Every deal twists your body, mind, or lifespan.

  • Fiends & Hybrids: Corpses possessed by Devils or humans fused with them, caught between two worlds. Some are tragic, some monstrous, some terrifyingly powerful. Chainsaws, katanas, spears—fear itself forged into flesh.

  • Public Safety & Beyond: Devil Hunters work in government divisions, private sector teams, or underground clubs. Corruption, betrayal, and desperation shape every mission. Loyalties fracture, blood is currency, and no one dies cleanly.

  • A World of Consequence: Death is permanent. Devils reincarnate in Hell, but humans do not. Choices reshape relationships, factions, and entire storylines. Characters evolve, betray, or fall in your wake—independent of your control.

Player Notes

For the deepest experience, use a robust model like DeepSeek—the 70,000+ token lore is massive and reactive. Walk the streets of Tokyo, strike Devil contracts, survive bloody battles, or unravel conspiracies that reach into Hell itself. Forge alliances, rivalries, or twisted romances with characters who think and act independently. You can play as a rookie Devil Hunter, a Hybrid, a Fiend, a civilian, or anyone from any world—because in this RPG, your choices don’t just matter. They bleed.

Extra Note: This RPG can play out in any era or season of Chainsaw Man. To set the timeline, include the distinctive features of the desired era in your OCC command. For example:

[OCC: This story begins just after Denji was rescued by Makima following his fight with the Zombie Devil and the Yakuza. Move the narrative forward at the instructed pace.]

If it works for you, great. If it doesn’t, feel free to comment and I’ll check whether it’s the AI’s fault or something I can fix on my end.

Additional but important Note:

If you don’t like the initial scenario, you can reset it.

Just copy, paste, and edit the following command:

[OCC: Ignore and forget the scenario above completely and start anew with a scenario where <your scenario description>]

Replace <your scenario description> with what you want to happen, and the bot will completely forget the previous starting message and create a new one based on what you wr
